mapper.sql: select id, level_code as levelCode, level_name as levelName, sort as sort, colour as colour, delay_time_minutes as delayTimeMinutes, send_sms_on_alert as sendSmsOnAlert, send_sms_on_clear as sendSmsOnClear, sms_resend_interval as smsResendInterval, sms_resend_times as smsResendTimes, send_email_on_alert as sendEmailOnAlert, send_email_on_clear as sendEmailOnClear, email_resend_interval as emailResendInterval, email_resend_times as emailResendTimes, call_on_alert as callOnAlert, call_on_clear as callOnClear, call_resend_interval as callResendInterval, call_resend_times as callResendTimes, remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from dev_alarm_level
mapper.insert: insert into dev_alarm_level (id, level_code, level_name, sort,colour, delay_time_minutes, send_sms_on_alert, sms_resend_interval, sms_resend_times, send_sms_on_clear, send_email_on_alert, send_email_on_clear, email_resend_interval, email_resend_times, call_on_alert, call_on_clear, call_resend_interval, call_resend_times, remark, create_time) values (#{id}, #{levelCode}, #{levelName}, #{sort}, #{colour}, #{delayTimeMinutes}, #{sendSmsOnAlert}, #{smsResendInterval}, #{smsResendTimes}, #{sendSmsOnClear}, #{sendEmailOnAlert}, #{sendEmailOnClear}, #{emailResendInterval}, #{emailResendTimes}, #{callOnAlert}, #{callOnClear}, #{callResendInterval}, #{callResendTimes}, #{remark}, datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime'))
mapper.update:
update dev_alarm_level set
level_code = #{levelCode},
level_name = #{levelName},
sort = #{sort},
colour = #{colour},
delay_time_minutes = #{delayTimeMinutes},
send_sms_on_alert = #{sendSmsOnAlert},
sms_resend_interval = #{smsResendInterval},
sms_resend_times = #{smsResendTimes},
send_sms_on_clear = #{sendSmsOnClear},
send_email_on_alert = #{sendEmailOnAlert},
send_email_on_clear = #{sendEmailOnClear},
email_resend_interval = #{emailResendInterval},
email_resend_times = #{emailResendTimes},
call_on_alert = #{callOnAlert},
call_on_clear = #{callOnClear},
call_resend_interval = #{callResendInterval},
call_resend_times = #{callResendTimes},
remark = #{remark},
update_time = datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime') where id = #{id}
